TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 'mulah == Upah, leqiy mlahang ke' ta kiy, isu musa 'mulah gaga na 'Tayal gi wal su pqbaqan kwara qu gaga na 'tayal. qutux uziy imi' na 'mulah qaniy hya' ga, niwan na qnzyu' sa kinbaqan squw laylaqi', ruw baq uziy quw laylaqi' lga, laha' lawziy quw musa' 'mulah sa kinbahan babaw niya' la.
S.PHON: == Ēmulańß == upańß, leqij mlańßaŇč ke Ē ta kij, is~…ēu mus~…ēa Ēmulańß …£a…£a na Ētajal …£i wal s~…ēu pqő≤aqan kwara qu …£a…£a na Ētajal. qutux uzij imi Ē na Ēmulańß qanij ńßja Ē …£a, niwan na qnzju Ē s~…ēa kinő≤aqan s~…ēquw lajlaqi Ē, ruw ő≤aq uzij quw lajlaqi Ē l…£a, lańßa Ē lawzij quw mus~…ēa Ē Ēmulańß s~…ēa kinő≤ańßan ő≤aő≤aw nija Ē la.
S.FORM: == 'mulah == Upah, leqiy mlahang ke' ta kiy, isu musa 'mulah gaga na 'Tayal gi wal su pqbaqan kwara qu gaga na 'tayal. qutux uziy imi' na 'mulah qaniy hya' ga, niwan na qnzyu' sa kinbaqan squw laylaqi', ruw baq uziy quw laylaqi' lga, laha' lawziy quw musa' 'mulah sa kinbahan babaw niya' la.
S.PHON: == Ēmulańß == upańß, leqij mlańßaŇč ke Ē ta kij, is~…ēu mus~…ēa Ēmulańß …£a…£a na Ētajal …£i wal s~…ēu pqő≤aqan kwara qu …£a…£a na Ētajal. qutux uzij imi Ē na Ēmulańß qanij ńßja Ē …£a, niwan na qnzju Ē s~…ēa kinő≤aqan s~…ēquw lajlaqi Ē, ruw ő≤aq uzij quw lajlaqi Ē l…£a, lańßa Ē lawzij quw mus~…ēa Ē Ēmulańß s~…ēa kinő≤ańßan ő≤aő≤aw nija Ē la.
